creator: makc@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Tue, 11 Nov 2008 04:26:03 +0900, Koji Yokota wrote:
> I think the problem is that print/lyx16 (and print/lyx15) requires Qt4.
> Is it already acceptable to set an application that requires Qt4 as
> standard?
Qt4 is not the problem, rather qt3 will be the problem soon :)

> Another point is that there will be another release from lyx-1.5.x
> stream. lyx16 is an overhaul from the previous version and it cannot be
> excluded that it may contain a lot of bugs. So, prudent users may want
> to use lyx15 for a while.
This makes sense.

Mikhail, would you handle this PR?

Max
